prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年最低位次约101名，2025年最低位次约126名，整体呈后移趋势，近5年后移约25名；2025年基准位次约126名；2021年计划38人，2025年 增至44人，2026年计划47人，较2025年扩招约6.8%，扩招使竞争略有缓和但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜连续多年稳居第1 名，国内顶尖学府地位稳固；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（主要涉及校园管理、食堂质量等日常事务舆情），但抖音综合热度排名第2（高热），短视频平台曝光 量极大，整体报考关注度仍处全国最前列；近年未见明显投档断档记录；拥有计算机科学与技术A+、控制科学与工程A+、电子信息A、临床医学A+、自动化A+、 材料科学与工程A+等大量A+/A级学科，学科实力覆盖工科、理科、医学全领域。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类2023-2024年持续高热推荐，电子信息/通信高热推荐，电气工程 高热推荐，清华强势专业与当前社会热门方向高度重合；2026年江苏省考生总数约52.1万人，较2025年（约35.8万人）大幅增长约45%，物理类考生估算约37.9万人，竞争基数显 著扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次126名、2026年扩招约6.8%使位次后移、但全省考生总数大幅增长约45%使竞争加剧，两相权衡下竞争加剧效应略占主导；预测2026 年最低位次约123名，区间73-173名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2021 was approximately 101, and in 2025 it was approximately 126, showing an overall backward trend, moving back about 25 places over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 126; the planned enrollment in 2021 was 38, increasing to 44 in 2025, and the 2026 plan is 47, an expansion of about 6.8% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranked first in the main ranking of China's top universities by Soft Science for many years, with a solid position as a top domestic institution; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative (mainly involving daily affairs such as campus management and cafeteria quality), but the comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is second (high heat), with massive exposure on short video platforms, and overall application attention remains at the forefront of the country; no significant gaps in admission have been observed in recent years; it has a large number of A+/A-level disciplines including Computer Science and Technology A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Electronic Information A, Clinical Medicine A+, Automation A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, covering the entire fields of engineering, science, and medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science has been consistently highly recommended from 2023 to 2024, Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended, Electrical Engineering is highly recommended, and Tsinghua's strong majors are highly aligned with current social hot trends; in 2026, the total number of examinees in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45% compared to 2025 (about 358,000), with an estimated 379,000 examinees in the Physics Category, significantly expanding the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 126 in 2025, the expansion of about 6.8% in 2026 causing a backward shift in ranking, but the total number of examinees in the province increasing by about 45% intensifying competition, the net effect is that the intensification of competition slightly dominates; the predicted lowest ranking for 2026 is approximately 123, with a range of 73-173.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Biology/Chemistry, Biological Sciences, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xiuzhong Academy/Ziqiang Academy/Cross Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Architecture, Planning, Landscape)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 73-173, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 73), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Clinical Medicine (Peking Union Medical College); if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 173), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.
